jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at 1mg - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
1mg invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About 1mg:
1mg is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 1mg!
